title: RAG Product Comparison
scenario: Create a comparison table for the Rugged Adventure Gear (RAG) waterproof backpack and a similar product from a competitor. The comparison table should highlight the key differences and similarities between the two products. The output should be in a markdown format and include at least 5 comparison points.
constraints: Must include at least 5 comparison points

evaluationCriteria.description: The comparison points are accurate and relevant.
The comparison points are organized into a clear and easy-to-read format.
The comparison points meet the word count and point requirements.
